features.label: Live Weather & System Monitor
features.desc: Added real-time weather info (via wttr.in) and a live System Stats monitor (CPU/RAM usage) to the New Tab page.

features.label: Search Engine Switcher
features.desc: Quickly switch between Google, DuckDuckGo, Bing, and Brave directly from the New Tab search bar.

features.label: Omnibox Suggestions
features.desc: The New Tab search bar now provides real-time suggestions from Google, bookmarks, and history.

features.label: Experimental Shorts Blocking
features.desc: Added basic CSS-based blocking for YouTube Shorts across the homepage, sidebar, and search results.

features.label: Anti-Adblock Detection Bypass
features.desc: YouTube updated its detection mechanism to identify blockers through missing IMA SDK signals and network error patterns. Fixed by refining webRequest filters and using randomized CSS selectors for injected styles.

features.label: Enforcement Message Removal
features.desc: Improved the removal of 'Adblockers violate terms' popups and enforcement messages. Added a fallback to auto-resume playback if the video is paused by an ad-related message.

features.label: Skip Button Selector Updates
features.desc: Added support for several new skip button variants and slot-based ad containers that were recently introduced by YouTube.

features.label: Enter Key Conflict in Search
features.desc: Fixed an issue where pressing Enter in the search input would trigger both a search and an omnibox selection simultaneously.

features.label: New Tab URL Navigation
features.desc: Fixed direct URL navigation from the New Tab search bar and added a loading animation for better feedback.

features.label: Stealth Injection via Shadow DOM
features.desc: Modified the injection script to use a more stealthy approach, reducing the footprint of the blocker's presence in the DOM to avoid detection by YouTube's MutationObserver scanners.

features.label: Advanced Ad Pattern Matching
features.desc: Expanded the ad URL pattern database to include new signals like ad_vbr, v_len, and ptchn, ensuring better accuracy in identifying ad-video segments.

features.label: Hyper-Skip Ad Logic
features.desc: Improved the ad skipping speed and reliability, ensuring ads are muted and fast-forwarded even if the skip button is delayed.
